name: Inverse_DCT_Integer_Accurate
operator_description: Performs accurate inverse Discrete Cosine Transform (IDCT) with dequantization on 8x8 DCT coefficient blocks using integer arithmetic for JPEG decompression. Uses high precision with scaled integer constants based on Loeffler-Ligtenberg-Moschytz algorithm, suitable for high-quality decoding. Transforms frequency domain coefficients back to spatial domain pixel data, restoring the original image after quantization and entropy decoding.
